title: Auto-clear support queue tickets and fix support push notifications
description:
When support answers a customer with chat or remote desktop, or when that engagement ends, the customer is removed from the Active Requests queue automatically. Support push notifications now use both an in-page toast and the browser notification API when permission is granted.

Who is affected: PipeShare support queue on BASE (admin) and SaaS customers requesting help.
changeLog: Clear support queue tickets when chat or remote support is answered.
Clear support queue tickets when chat or remote support ends.
Browser notifications for support requests when the toggle is on and permission is allowed.
In-page support request toast stays visible above other panels.
